title: Executive Order 9270—Correcting Executive Order No. 9257 of October 15, 1942, Enlarging Naval Petroleum Reserve No. 1
text:
CALIFORNIA
By virtue of the authority vested in me as President of the United States, it is ordered that the land description contained in Executive Order No. 9257 of October 15, 1942, enlarging Naval Petroleum Reserve No. 1, in California, be, and it is hereby, corrected to read as follows:
MOUNT DIABLO BASE AND MERIDIAN
T. 30 S., R 24 E.,
secs. 21 and 22, all;
sec. 23, S½, NW¼NW¼, S½NW¼, and SW¼NE¼;
sec. 24, S½SW¼ and SW¼SE¼;
secs. 25, 26, 27, 35 and 36, all.
T. 30 S., R. 25 E., sec 31, W½.
T. 31 S., R. 25 E., sec. 6, W½.
FRANKLIN D ROOSEVELT
The White House,
November 13, 1942.
